hooks.command: cd /home/user/Liste_de_datas && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const now=new Date();const dd=String(now.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const mm=String(now.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');const yy=String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2);const today=dd+'/'+mm+'/'+yy;const match=pkg.version.match(/^(\d{2}\/\d{2}\/\d{2})-(\d+)$/);const num=(match&&match[1]===today)?Number(match[2])+1:1;pkg.version=today+'-'+num;fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+'\n');console.log('Version: '+pkg.version);" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Mise à jour de la version…
